user_feedback: when the game is paused, I dont want to see paused press ESC to resume, and I don't want the game to be grayed out, but I also don't want the HUD to be hidden, and I want the enemies to not keep spinning around
analysis:
- Issue identified: When paused, the HUD is not being rendered (renderUI is not called), and enemies continue spinning because their rotation is based on p.frameCount which increments even when the game is paused
- Files affected: game.js, entities.js
- Changes needed: 
  1. Add renderUI(p) call in the PAUSED case in game.js to show the HUD while paused
  2. Add a rotation property to Enemy class that updates during update() method
  3. Use this rotation property in render() instead of p.frameCount so rotation stops when game is paused
